description: As May and Elena train together, May encourages Elena to pursue a relationship with Keller, advising her to live life despite complications with Mack. The conversation explores their emotional vulnerabilities, adding depth to their characters and strengthening their rapport as colleagues and friends.

transcript.line: Good. Remember your foot position on impact. You know, your poker face needs work, too.
I need a poker face while I'm fighting?
Doesn't hurt. But I meant in the meeting today.
Agent Keller? He's obviously attracted to you. And you try hard not to laugh at his jokes. I'm betting it's mutual.
That against the rules or something?
No. That's my point. You should feel free to pursue it, have a drink with him. No doubt Mack's picking up on it, too, but you shouldn't have to protect his feelings.
That's easy to say. How can I not?
Look, I've tried everything, you know? I was willing to work on it, but...
He dove into his job 100%, locked himself in that office.
Mack didn't close the doors to avoid distractions. He just closed the doors on me.
You two have been through a lot. But now it's been a year, and if last year has taught me anything, it's that life isn't meant to be lived alone. I don't often give advice, but that's my advice.
Yeah, that was a lot of talking. Are you okay?
